programme.title: Going Global
programme.desc: Follow Odell Beckham Jr.'s trip to Germany to spread America's Game internationally. OBJ hangs with Bayern Munich, his German fans, the Munich Cowboys, dives into German lederhosen and food culture. Odell then takes a trip to London.

programme.title: School of Golf

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy explains common amateur mistakes when trying to add distance and his par 5 strategy when going for the green in two.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy answers member-submitted questions about how to swing better, shoot lower scores and have more fun with challenges on the golf course.

programme.title: Playing Lessons

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris and Randy dive into golf swing technique and discuss things such as ball position and club path that can help amateur golfers of any handicap.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2016 European Ryder Cup player Matthew Fitzpatrick shares his best tips, drills and instruction as he navigates the beautiful Loblolly in Hobe Sound, Florida.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part one of this two-part episode.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part two of this two-part episode. Rory shares his pre-round putting routine and goes in-depth on his green reading process.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA Tour standout Wyndham Clark goes in depth with his on-course strategies. Wyndham gives insight into how he plays par 5's aggressively and shows unique viewpoints on when it is worth it to lay-up on par 3's.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin teaches skills and strategies to help improve your golf game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Hale Irwin shares tips and tricks on his short game.

programme.desc: Rory McIlroy and his lifetime instructor, Michael Bannon, share drills and tips used throughout McIlroy's career.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy discusses his pre-putt routine, course management strategies and green reading process with Brandel Chamblee on the course.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches the key shots that helped players become a Masters Champion; learn to control distance with irons like Tiger Woods, shape shots like Hideki Matsuyama and putt on fast greens like Jack Nicklaus.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches a detailed plan to improve practice and take those new skills to the course; learning a practice habit made famous by Tiger Woods and a simple stroke saver used by Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how the arms, shoulders, torso and legs should work for a proper swing sequence; learning drills to stop casting from Xander Schauffele; maximizing distance from Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches a variety of shots with a variety of clubs to help a player become a short game wizard; learn the benefits of hitting one-handed pitch shots, how to play the super high flop shot and a short game tip from Jack Nicklaus.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches the key checkpoints in a swing to help crush a driver like Rory.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how to correct the biggest swing faults caused by poor lower body action.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.sub-title: Ireland and Northern Ireland - Atlantic Beginnings
programme.desc: Paul McGinley plays the stunning and legendary Hole 4 at The Old Head Golf Links, which perches on the edge of a cliff, overlooking the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: At Salgados in the Algarve, Chris plays the seventh hole, a par 4, and enjoys an afternoon in the sunshine as he takes on the palm-lined course.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Chris and Paul play the 16th hole at the Royal course at Vale do Lobo, a famous course in Portugal.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the 18th hole at Quinta do Lago Laranjal in the Algarve, the newest of the three courses at Quinta do Lago.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the sixth hole, a dogleg par 4, at a hilltop course in Lisbon, Portugal, at Penha Longa in the Cascais area.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the 14th hole in Aroeira near Lisbon, Portugal, a course that Paul knows well from playing the Portuguese Open.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.sub-title: Through the Bag: How a Straw Can Improve Your Putting
programme.desc: Golf has never been more of a power game than it is right now. Shortening the golf course off the tee has a bigger impact on lowering scores than ever before. And it's not just a strategy for disruptor-pros like Bryson DeChambeau.

programme.title: Golf Fitness Over 50+
programme.desc: Fitness coach Don Saladino is joined by instructor Debbie Doniger and Vince Cellini for a workout plan aimed at the over 50 golfers that will help to swing faster with more control and less risk of injury.

programme.title: Golf Fitness Over 50+
programme.desc: Fitness coach Don Saladino is joined by instructor Debbie Doniger and Vince Cellini for a workout plan aimed at the over 50 golfers that will help to swing faster with more control and less risk of injury.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como travels to Scottsdale, Ariz., and spends a day with the VISION54 team of Pia Nilsson and Lynn Marriott. Pia and Lynn approach golf in a much different way than most, focusing on human skills instead of technical skills.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como spends a day at the University of Texas with the Texas Longhorns men's golf team. Head Coach John Fields explains how he recruits players who want to play on the PGA Tour, and Cole Hammer displays one of the best swings in college golf.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como visits a golf school at the Tour Striker Golf Academy in Phoenix. Learn how GOLFPASS coach Martin Chuck implements easy-to-use training aids to help fix swing faults for thousands of students a year.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
